parameters.name: chatType
parameters.description: The type of chat widget. Supports normal ChatType values, plus the virtual umbrella "webChat" (maps to facebookChat/emailChat/instagramChat/waChat).

parameters.name: allInOneChatTypes
parameters.description: All-in-one chat type to filter by. Only applies when chatType is "allInOneChat". Supports normal ChatType values plus the virtual umbrella "webChat" (maps to facebookChat/emailChat/instagramChat/waChat).

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access.name: Authorization
Location-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Location-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account.

Agency-Access.name: Authorization
Agency-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency (OR) Private Integration Token of Agency.

Agency-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Agency-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency.

a2pOptInForm1.example: I agree to receive marketing communications from [business name]

a2pOptInForm1ShowCheckbox.description: Show checkbox for A2P Opt In Form 1

a2pOptInForm1PreChecked.description: Pre-checked state for A2P Opt In Form 1 checkbox

a2pOptInForm2.example: I agree to receive marketing communications from [business name]

a2pOptInForm2ShowCheckbox.description: Show checkbox for A2P Opt In Form 2

a2pOptInForm2PreChecked.description: Pre-checked state for A2P Opt In Form 2 checkbox

isA2POptInForm1.description: Is A2P Opt In Form 1 enabled

enableContactForm.description: Boolean for showing contact form at start

defaultConsentCheck.description: By default consent check for contact form

allInOneChatTypes.description: Chat types included in the all-in-one widget

allInOneInitialMsg.example: Choose a chat option to get started.

example.marketingComplianceMessage: This is a marketing compliance message
example.a2pComplianceMessage: This is a A2P compliance message

autoCountryCode.description: Boolean indicating whether to automatically detect country code

enableRevisitMessage.description: Boolean indicating whether to enable a revisit message

legalMsg.example: By using this website, you agree to our terms and conditions.

liveChatAckMsg.example: Thank you for reaching out. How may I assist you today?

liveChatEndedMsg.description: Message indicating the end of a live chat
liveChatEndedMsg.example: Thank you for chatting with us. Have a great day!

liveChatFeedbackMsg.description: Message asking for feedback after a live chat
liveChatFeedbackMsg.example: We would appreciate your feedback. Please rate your experience.

liveChatFeedbackNote.example: Your feedback helps us improve our services.

liveChatIntroMsg.description: Introduction message for a live chat
liveChatIntroMsg.example: Hello! Welcome to our live chat support. How can I assist you today?

liveChatUserInactiveMsg.description: Message for inactive users during a live chat
liveChatUserInactiveMsg.example: Are you still there? Please let us know if you need assistance.

liveChatUserInactiveTime.description: Time for considering a user inactive during a live chat

liveChatVisitorInactiveMsg.description: Message for inactive visitors during a live chat
liveChatVisitorInactiveMsg.example: Looks like you stepped away. Feel free to return whenever you need help.

liveChatVisitorInactiveTime.description: Time for considering a visitor inactive during a live chat

promptMsg.example: Need assistance? Feel free to ask us anything!

revisitPromptMsg.example: Welcome back! How can we help you today?

showAgencyBranding.description: Boolean indicating whether to show agency branding

showConsentCheckbox.description: Boolean indicating whether to show a consent checkbox

showLiveChatWelcomeMsg.description: Boolean indicating whether to show a welcome message for live chat

showPrompt.description: Boolean indicating whether to show prompts

subHeading.example: We are here to help you!

successMsg.example: Your message has been sent successfully.

thankYouMsg.example: Thank you for visiting our website!

useEmailField.description: Boolean indicating whether to use an email field
